description: State document, in Arabic script. Heavily blurred. The left halves of 7 lines are preserved (which seem to comprise the entire document). Opens with formulaic praises (ونعماه وكبت اعداه اكمل مروة واعلا ). Mentions the requisite love for the addressee (shurūṭ al-mawadda). May mention the flood of the Nile (ىفيض الما).
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
